title: Superior Sandwich Platter Trays - Pack of 10 Catering Trays for Parties - Buffet Serving Tray with Spill Proof Lids - Catering Platters for Cakes, Parties & Events, Meal Prep Large Tray
features: Built to Last: Say goodbye to flimsy trays! These serving trays are durable; just hand wash them with warm soap and water, and they’re ready for your next event

Perfect Size: Measuring 33cm long, 23cm wide, and 5cm high, these catering trays are perfectly sized to accommodate sandwiches side by side without cramming or damage. Whether you’re serving cake slices, pastries, or sweet treats

Secure Protective Lids: No More Mess or Spills; Our serving tray with lid comes with securely sealed transparent lids that lock tightly to protect your food from spills. The clear lids allow easy identification of contents, saving time when serving your delicious creations

Stackable & Easy to Transport: Save space and transport effortlessly! These stackable serving trays allow for compact storage in fridges or catering vehicles. Designed for bulk transport, these stacked sandwich trays maintain their integrity under pressure; no cracks, holes

Versatile Serving Solution: These sandwich trays for parties with lid are perfect for weddings, parties, outdoor events, or professional catering, they elevate your food presentation while keeping items fresh and protected. Serve confidently knowing your trays combine style, functionality, and quality
